mechanics.name_guess: 26) indicates primary and sec ondary languages, some
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 103 > locations > 26) indicates primary and sec ondary languages, some
mechanics.excerpt: 26) indicates primary and sec ondary languages, some of which are automatically known starting characters and NPCs from that region (see Free Skills under Stage 1: Early Childhood, p. 33). Additional languages may be acquired through the Life Path or character advancement.
